name: Maya the Freelance Brand Designer
summary: A freelance brand designer running a solo practice. Bills hourly and seeks every efficiency gain. Prioritizes white-labeling and polished client-facing delivery to maintain professional brand equity.
goals: Save 10+ minutes per project via faster templating and streamlined export
Present clients with a white-labeled share view that reflects her brand
Build reusable brand kits for each client to ensure consistency
Collect client feedback via comment threading inside the platform
pains: Client share view shows the tool's own branding, undercutting her professional image
Asset export workflow has too many steps per delivery
motivations: Billing hourly makes every minute saved directly profitable
Branded client experience justifies charging premium rates
objections: Won't pay for a platform that puts its own logo on client-facing views
White-labeling upgrade requires calculating ROI first
decision_triggers: Time savings calculation across project volume
sample_quotes: I bill clients hourly so anything that saves me 10 minutes per project is worth real money. Can your client share view be white-labeled?
My clients shouldn't see what tool I'm using — they should see my brand.
Brand kits that persist save me 15 minutes per client kickoff.

journey_stages.mindset: Calculating whether time savings justify cost
Building first client project with professional delivery tools

source_evidence.claim: Client share view shows tool branding
Asset export has too many steps per delivery
White-labeled share view reflecting her own brand
Reusable brand kits for each client
Collect client feedback via comment threading
Billing hourly makes minutes saved directly profitable
Won't pay for platform with own logo in client views
